name: Asus VG27AQ3A (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 180Hz, 1ms GTG ) 2K
highlights: ASUS TUF Gaming VG27AQ3A is a high-performance 27-inch WQHD gaming monitor designed for smooth, responsive gameplay
Featuring a blazing-fast 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms GTG response time, and Fast IPS panel with 130% sRGB color gamut, it delivers vibrant visuals and ultra-low latency
Equipped with ELMB Sync, Adaptive-Sync (G-SYNC Compatible, FreeSync Premium), and Shadow Boost, this HDR10-certified monitor ensures immersive, tear-free gaming
